div1.entryFree: Ore, a vein of gold: when beauty boasted blushes, in despite virtue would stain that o. with silver white, Lucr. 56 (M. Edd. o'er).* to what metal this counterfeit lump of o. will be melted, All's III, 6, 40 (O. Edd. ours). like some o. among a mineral of metals base, Hml. IV, 1, 25.
